allow: Bash(node -e "const { Expand, Images } = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Expand:', Expand ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\); console.log\('Images:', Images ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\);")
Bash(node -e "const { ZoomIn, Grid } = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('ZoomIn:', ZoomIn ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\); console.log\('Grid:', Grid ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\);")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const icons = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.match\(/zoom|grid|image|photo|expand|gallery|layout/i\)\); console.log\(icons.join\(', '\)\);")
